data.title: XRP Surges 12% From Its April Lows: What's Going On?
data.description: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) has seen a notable 12.5% increase from its low in April. In the U.S., spot ETFs received a massive $41.64 million in net inflows for the week ending April 16, marking the largest weekly inflow in three months. This surge is a significant 254% rise from the previous week's $11.75 million. This sudden acceleration is often associated with pattern breakouts rather than consolidation. Over the last five days, there has been consistent demand with inflows of $11.87 million, $17.11 million, $11.20 million, $1.46 million, and $9.09 million. Cumulatively, inflows have now totaled $1.26 billion, pushing the total assets past $1.08 billion. Bitwise and Franklin products are leading in terms of flows, while Grayscale has shown mixed activity. Despite earlier outflows, Grayscale's performance still impacts the overall totals. This shift in dynamics has created a notable difference in timing and investor behavior.

data.title: Capsule Security Exits Stealth With $7M to Stop AI Agents From Going Rogue at Runtime
data.description: An Israeli company, Capsule Security, specializing in protecting agentic AI, has emerged from stealth mode after securing a $7 million seed funding round. The funding was primarily provided by Lama Partners and Forgepoint Capital International. Capsule Security focuses on safeguarding the volatile element within the AI technology stack during operation. This ensures that AI agents cannot be tampered with, act inappropriately, or covertly access and remove data when interacting with sensitive information and performing tasks within business environments. Additionally, Capsule has gained valuable guidance from prominent figures in the security industry.

data.title: 'The Entire Banking System Will Go To ETH,' Says Raoul Pal As Ethereum Attempts Breakout
data.description: Renowned macro investor Raoul Pal predicts that the entire banking system will transition to Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) as ETH hits $2,355, testing the 100 exponential moving average for the first time since October. Pal emphasizes the importance of the Lindy effects for banks, highlighting the credibility and proven track record of Ethereum. He dismisses the notion of "ETH is dead" from 1.5-2 years ago, asserting that banks are gradually recognizing the potential of ETH. Co-founder of Etherealize, Danny Ryan, discusses the significance of decentralization for customers in the blockchain space. Pal emphasizes that although it may not be solely Ethereum dominating the scene, the banking industry's adoption of ETH is inevitable due to the trust in established technologies to prevent job losses.

data.title: BTC nears Bollinger Band resistance at $78K, eyes $80K before possible correction to $68K. Momentum signals caution.
data.description: The current Bitcoin trading price is hovering near the resistance level of $78,000, close to the Bollinger Band. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates the potential for further upward movement. Based on the technical analysis, it is anticipated that there is a 72-hour timeframe for Bitcoin to test the $80,000 mark. However, there is a momentum divergence hinting at a significant downward correction shortly afterward.

data.title: Impact Capital Group Releases New Analysis on Real Estate’s Growing Influence on Lower Middle Market M&A Transaction Outcomes
data.description: In Los Angeles, Impact Capital Group, Inc. (Impact) revealed a new analysis focusing on the impact of owned and leased real estate on private company sale transactions. The report titled "The Real Estate Variable: How Real Estate Shapes Lower Middle Market M&A" showcases case studies from Impact's advisory work. This analysis emphasizes the significant role real estate plays in these transactions. It underscores the ways in which real estate can influence, complicate, and at times obstruct deals in the lower middle market. The report provides valuable insights based on anonymized data from the firm's experiences.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures, Oil Prices In Focus: Hormuz Shut, Trump Announces New Iran Talks
data.description: Concerns rise over the impact on futures and oil prices as Iran maintains tight control over the Strait of Hormuz. President Trump revealed plans for new talks on Monday. Tesla's upcoming earnings report also adds to the looming uncertainties. The situation has garnered attention, with the Dow Jones Futures and oil prices being closely monitored.

data.title: BTC plummets to $75K amidst concerns over new Hormuz closure, signaling potential market turbulence amid revived US-Iran tensions.
data.description: The recent resurgence of tension between the US and Iran has sparked concerns of potential market instability, with Bitcoin indicating a looming economic turmoil. There are signs suggesting the renewal of the US-Iran conflict, with reports indicating the possible closure of the vital oil route, the Strait of Hormuz. The situation has sent shockwaves through the financial sector, with many bracing for the impact. Investors are closely monitoring developments as the situation unfolds, with fears of widespread repercussions on a global scale.

data.title: Lyra Therapeutics, Inc. Announces Intention to Voluntarily File Form 25 for Delisting from Nasdaq and Subsequent Deregistration with the SEC
data.description: Lyra Therapeutics, Inc. announced on April 17, 2026, its decision to voluntarily file a Form 25 Notification of Delisting with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on April 20, 2026, to remove its common stock from listing and registration on The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC. The trading of the Company's common stock was halted by Nasdaq on March 17, 2026. While Nasdaq plans to submit its Form 25 after internal procedural periods, this has not yet occurred. Consequently, the Company is taking the initiative to deregister by submitting Form 25. Currently, the Company's common stock is listed on the Pink Limited Market. This action is in compliance with Rule 12d2-2(c) under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended.

data.title: How To Take Great Notes Without Skipping A Beat
data.description: For the majority of the past century, the practice of taking notes typically consisted of using a pen and paper during presentations or speeches. This method involved actively listening to the speaker and quickly jotting down important phrases to help remember the information. Learn effective note-taking techniques in the article "How To Take Great Notes Without Skipping A Beat," recently featured in Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Madison Air Stock Gains Premarket After Strong NYSE Debut
data.description: On Friday, Madison Air Solutions Corp. (NYSE: MAIR) saw a significant increase in its shares during premarket trading. The company had recently made its debut on the New York Stock Exchange with the ticker symbol 'MAIR'. This positive movement comes amidst a generally optimistic market environment following widespread gains on Thursday. The IPO conducted by Madison Air Solutions garnered substantial attention, with the company raising over $2.2 billion. The initial public offering took place on April 15, with each share priced at $27.00, and a total of 82.7 million Class shares being offered to investors. Further details can be found in the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Closes Higher Ahead Of Peace Talks; Palantir Plunges (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the stock market experienced a mixed trading day, with the Dow Jones index dropping. Notably, chipmaker TSMC saw a significant increase due to strong sales, while the Nasdaq index closed higher. The market is gearing up for peace talks, with Palantir facing a steep decline. This report highlights the dynamic movements in the market today, showcasing the volatility and opportunities present for investors.

data.title: Kailera Therapeutics Announces Pricing of Initial Public Offering
data.description: Today, Kailera Therapeutics, Inc. disclosed the pricing of its initial public offering on the Nasdaq stock exchange under the ticker symbol KLRA. The company has not specified the exact pricing details, but the IPO involves the issuance of a certain number of shares to investors at a set price. This move marks a significant milestone for Kailera as it transitions into a publicly-traded entity. Investors and stakeholders will be closely monitoring the performance of the stock following its debut on the market.

data.title: Netflix Stock Sinks On Soft Guidance After Q1 Beat
data.description: In the first quarter, Netflix surpassed Wall Street's expectations as the streaming video platform reported strong financial results. However, the company's forecast for the second quarter fell short, leading to a decline in Netflix stock. The stock market reacted negatively to the soft guidance provided by Netflix following a successful Q1, causing a drop in the company's stock price.

data.title: Orthogon Therapeutics Raises an Additional $11M Financing for Its BK Virus Antiviral Drug Program
data.description: Orthogon Therapeutics, based in Canton, Massachusetts, has recently concluded a subsequent funding round, securing $11 million. This brings their total raised capital to $36 million. The funding is intended to propel the development of their groundbreaking drug targeting BK polyomavirus, a common source of complications in transplant recipients. Presently, there are no authorized treatments for BK virus infections. Orthogon Therapeutics aims to pioneer an oral therapy that effectively tackles the entire range of BK infection stages, from initial reactivation through to further complications.

data.title: Mining Stock Albemarle Breaks Out Amid Surging Lithium Prices
data.description: The costs of lithium saw an upward trend in 2025 and are steadily rising in 2026. Albemarle, a leading mining stock, has seen a significant increase in its value due to the surge in lithium prices. This information was shared in a recent article by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Horizon Quantum and AQT to Advance Real-World Quantum Applications with Strategic Hardware–Software Collaboration
data.description: In a recent collaboration announcement, Horizon Quantum Computing Pte. Ltd., a subsidiary of Horizon Quantum Holdings Ltd. (Nasdaq: HQ), and AQT (Alpine Quantum Technologies) disclosed their partnership to enhance the progress of practical quantum computing applications through a more comprehensive hardware-software integration strategy. AQT is a prominent European provider of trapped-ion quantum computers. This partnership aims to leverage the strengths of both companies to further the development of quantum technologies.
